case_title: JIM DILLARD VS. CAUCHO TECHNOLOGY INC

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CAUCHO TECHNOLOGY INC   (C.O. STEVE MONTAL) HEARING SET FOR JUL-09-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.04 FILED BY DILLARD, JIM AS TO DEFENDANT CAUCHO TECHNOLOGY INC   (C.O. STEVE MONTAL) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-01-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
